tuning: E A D G B E

Capo 1 fret

[Intro]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]E/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]               
We built this city, we built this city on rock and  roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]            
Built this city, we built this city on rock and ro  -oll[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]A/E[/ch]                                  
Say you don't know me, or recognize my face[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]                    [ch]B7/E[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]                                   
Say you don't care who goes to that kind of place[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]A/E[/ch]                                                                                        
Knee deep in the hoopla, sinking in your fight                                                            [/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]      [ch]B7/E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B/D#[/ch]
Too many runaways   eating up the night[/tab]

[Verse 2] 
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]A/E[/ch]                                                              
Someone's always playing corporation games[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]A/E[/ch]
